title: Protection of openings
text: Openings above, below, or near travelways shall be protected by railings or covers.

title: Electrical conductors
text: Electrical conductors shall be insulated adequately.

title: Housekeeping
text: Workplaces shall be kept clean and orderly.

title: Safety belts and lines
text: Safety belts and lines shall be worn when persons work where there is danger of falling.

title: Safety defects
text: Self-propelled mobile equipment shall be maintained in safe operating condition.
